query:
-- How many projects have been enriched via Apollo cache, and how many are expired/eligible for re-run
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as totalCacheEntries,
  SUM(CASE WHEN enrichedAt > DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as freshCache,
  SUM(CASE WHEN enrichedAt <= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as expiredCache,
  SUM(contactsFound) as totalContactsFound,
  SUM(contactsNew) as totalContactsNew,
  SUM(apiCallsMade) as totalApiCalls,
  AVG(contactsFound) as avgContactsPerProject
FROM projectEnrichmentCache;
command:

  SUM(contactsFound) as totalContactsFound,
